name: JSON Formatter
intro: Format, beautify, and validate JSON online.
description: Use this free JSON formatter to clean up minified JSON, improve readability, and quickly validate JSON structure.

faq.q: What does a JSON formatter do?
faq.a: A JSON formatter makes raw JSON easier to read by adding indentation and line breaks.

faq.q: Can I validate JSON with this tool?
faq.a: Yes. A JSON formatter can also help detect invalid JSON structure.

name: JSON Validator
intro: Validate JSON structure online.
description: Check whether your JSON is valid and catch syntax issues quickly with this free JSON validator.

faq.q: What is a JSON validator?
faq.a: A JSON validator checks whether JSON syntax is correct and properly structured.

faq.q: Can this tool find JSON errors?
faq.a: Yes. It helps identify invalid JSON formatting and syntax mistakes.

name: JSON Minifier
intro: Minify JSON by removing spaces and line breaks.
description: Compress JSON into a compact single-line format for storage, transfer, or embedding.

faq.q: What does a JSON minifier do?
faq.a: It removes whitespace, indentation, and line breaks from JSON to reduce size.

faq.q: Will JSON still work after minifying?
faq.a: Yes. Valid JSON remains valid after minification.

name: Base64 Encoder
intro: Encode plain text to Base64 format online.
description: Convert plain text into Base64 instantly with this free online Base64 encoder.

faq.q: What is Base64 encoding?
faq.a: Base64 encoding converts text or binary data into an ASCII string format.

faq.q: Is Base64 encryption?
faq.a: No. Base64 is encoding, not encryption.

name: Base64 Decoder
intro: Decode Base64 text back into readable text.
description: Use this free Base64 decoder to convert Base64 strings back into plain text.

faq.q: What does a Base64 decoder do?
faq.a: It converts Base64-encoded text back into its original readable form.

faq.q: Can I decode Base64 online for free?
faq.a: Yes. This tool is free to use online.

name: URL Encoder
intro: Encode text for safe use in URLs.
description: Convert special characters into URL-safe encoding for query strings, links, and parameters.

faq.q: Why do I need URL encoding?
faq.a: URL encoding makes special characters safe to use inside URLs and query parameters.

faq.q: Does URL encoding change text meaning?
faq.a: No. It only changes how special characters are represented in URLs.

name: URL Decoder
intro: Decode URL-encoded text into readable form.
description: Convert percent-encoded URL strings back into plain readable text instantly.

faq.q: What does a URL decoder do?
faq.a: It converts encoded URL characters like %20 back into normal readable text.

faq.q: Can I decode query parameters with this tool?
faq.a: Yes. It is useful for decoding links and query strings.

name: HTML Encoder
intro: Encode special characters into HTML entities.
description: Convert characters like <, >, and & into HTML-safe entities for code and content.

faq.q: Why use HTML encoding?
faq.a: HTML encoding prevents special characters from being interpreted as HTML markup.

faq.q: What characters are usually encoded?
faq.a: Common examples include angle brackets, ampersands, and quotes.

name: HTML Decoder
intro: Decode HTML entities into normal text.
description: Convert HTML entities like & and < back into readable characters.

faq.q: What does an HTML decoder do?
faq.a: It converts encoded HTML entities back into their original characters.

faq.q: Is this useful for copied HTML text?
faq.a: Yes. It helps when text contains entity codes instead of symbols.

name: MD5 Hash Generator
intro: Generate an MD5 hash from text.
description: Create MD5 hashes from input strings for testing, checksums, and quick comparisons.

faq.q: What is an MD5 hash?
faq.a: MD5 is a hashing algorithm that converts input text into a fixed-length hash value.

faq.q: Is MD5 secure for passwords?
faq.a: No. MD5 is outdated and should not be used for password storage.

name: SHA256 Hash Generator
intro: Generate a SHA256 hash from text.
description: Convert input text into a SHA256 hash for checksums, testing, and development tasks.

faq.q: What is SHA256 used for?
faq.a: SHA256 is commonly used for checksums, integrity checks, and cryptographic workflows.

faq.q: Can two different inputs have the same SHA256 hash?
faq.a: In practice this is extremely unlikely.

name: UUID Generator
intro: Generate random UUIDs online.
description: Create unique identifiers for apps, databases, APIs, and development workflows.

faq.q: What is a UUID?
faq.a: A UUID is a universally unique identifier used to label records and objects.

faq.q: Why use a UUID generator?
faq.a: It helps create unique IDs without needing a central counter.

name: IP Lookup
intro: Check basic information about an IP address.
description: Look up useful IP address details with this simple online IP lookup tool.

faq.q: What is an IP lookup tool?
faq.a: An IP lookup tool helps you inspect information related to an IP address.

faq.q: Can I use this IP lookup tool for free?
faq.a: Yes. It is free to use.

name: DNS Lookup
intro: Check DNS records for a domain.
description: Inspect domain DNS information such as A, AAAA, MX, TXT, and CNAME records.

faq.q: What is a DNS lookup?
faq.a: A DNS lookup checks the DNS records associated with a domain.

faq.q: What records can be checked?
faq.a: Common records include A, AAAA, MX, TXT, NS, and CNAME.

name: Ping Test
intro: Test basic host reachability online.
description: Use a ping test tool to check whether a host responds and estimate network latency.

faq.q: What does a ping test do?
faq.a: It checks whether a host is reachable and measures response time.

faq.q: Can ping fail even if a site is up?
faq.a: Yes. Some servers block ICMP ping responses.

name: Port Checker
intro: Check whether a port is open on a host.
description: Test common TCP ports and verify whether a target host is listening on a specific port.

faq.q: What is a port checker?
faq.a: A port checker tests whether a specific network port is open and reachable.

faq.q: Why would a port appear closed?
faq.a: It may be blocked by a firewall, filtered, or not have a listening service.

name: Word Counter
intro: Count words, characters, and lines in text.
description: Analyze text length instantly with this simple online word counter.

faq.q: What does a word counter measure?
faq.a: It usually counts words, characters, spaces, and sometimes lines or paragraphs.

faq.q: Can I use a word counter for essays?
faq.a: Yes. It is useful for essays, articles, and social media drafts.

name: Character Counter
intro: Count characters in text instantly.
description: Check total character count with and without spaces for any piece of text.

faq.q: What is a character counter?
faq.a: A character counter measures the number of characters in a text string.

faq.q: Does it count spaces?
faq.a: Many tools provide both counts with spaces and without spaces.

name: Remove Extra Spaces
intro: Clean text by removing unnecessary spaces.
description: Remove duplicate spaces and tidy messy text formatting with one click.

faq.q: What does this tool do?
faq.a: It removes repeated or unnecessary spaces from text.

faq.q: Is it useful for copied text?
faq.a: Yes. It helps clean text copied from PDFs, websites, and documents.

name: Text Case Converter
intro: Convert text to upper case, lower case, title case, and more.
description: Quickly change text capitalization for content writing, coding, and formatting work.

faq.q: What cases can be converted?
faq.a: Common options include UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, and sentence case.

faq.q: Who uses a text case converter?
faq.a: Writers, students, marketers, and developers often use it.

name: Timestamp Converter
intro: Convert Unix timestamps into readable dates and times.
description: Translate Unix epoch timestamps into human-readable date and time values instantly.

faq.q: What is a Unix timestamp?
faq.a: A Unix timestamp is the number of seconds since January 1, 1970 UTC.

faq.q: Why use a timestamp converter?
faq.a: It helps you read and verify machine-generated time values.

name: Bytes to MB Converter
intro: Convert bytes into megabytes quickly.
description: Use this free converter to change byte values into megabytes for storage and file size calculations.

faq.q: How many bytes are in a megabyte?
faq.a: That depends on whether you use decimal or binary measurement, but tools usually make the conversion automatically.

faq.q: Why use a bytes to MB converter?
faq.a: It makes storage values easier to understand and compare.

name: Percentage Calculator
intro: Calculate percentages quickly and easily.
description: Work out percentages, increases, decreases, and percentage differences with a simple calculator.

faq.q: What can a percentage calculator do?
faq.a: It can calculate parts of a whole, percentage changes, increases, and decreases.

faq.q: Who uses percentage calculators?
faq.a: Students, shoppers, business users, and anyone working with ratios or discounts.

name: Age Calculator
intro: Calculate age from a birth date.
description: Find age in years, months, and days using a simple online age calculator.

faq.q: How does an age calculator work?
faq.a: It compares a birth date with the current date to calculate age.

faq.q: Can it show months and days too?
faq.a: Yes. Many age calculators show a more detailed age breakdown.

name: Text Reverser
intro: Reverse text instantly online.
description: Use this free text reverser to flip the order of characters in any text.

faq.q: What does a text reverser do?
faq.a: It reverses the order of characters in the text you enter.

faq.q: Can I reverse a sentence online?
faq.a: Yes. Paste your sentence and the tool will reverse it instantly.

name: Lowercase Converter
intro: Convert text to lowercase.
description: Turn uppercase or mixed text into lowercase with one click.

faq.q: What does a lowercase converter do?
faq.a: It changes all letters in your text to lowercase.

faq.q: Can I convert full paragraphs to lowercase?
faq.a: Yes. The tool works for words, sentences, and long text blocks.

name: Uppercase Converter
intro: Convert text to uppercase.
description: Change any text into uppercase letters instantly.

faq.q: What does an uppercase converter do?
faq.a: It changes all letters in your text to uppercase.

faq.q: Can I use it for headings and titles?
faq.a: Yes. It is useful for headings, labels, and emphasized text.

name: Line Counter
intro: Count the number of lines in text.
description: Use this free line counter to quickly measure how many lines your text contains.

faq.q: What is a line counter?
faq.a: A line counter measures how many text lines are present in the input.

faq.q: Can I count lines in pasted text?
faq.a: Yes. Paste your text and the tool will count the lines instantly.

name: Duplicate Line Remover
intro: Remove duplicate lines from text.
description: Clean up repeated lines in lists, logs, and copied text with one click.

faq.q: What does a duplicate line remover do?
faq.a: It removes repeated lines and keeps only unique lines.

faq.q: Is it useful for logs and lists?
faq.a: Yes. It is useful for cleaning repeated entries in logs, lists, and pasted text.

name: Text Trimmer
intro: Trim leading and trailing spaces from text.
description: Remove spaces at the beginning and end of your text instantly.

faq.q: What does a text trimmer do?
faq.a: It removes extra spaces from the beginning and end of the text.

faq.q: Does it change spaces inside the text?
faq.a: No. It only trims the outer spaces.

name: Slug Generator
intro: Convert text into a URL-friendly slug.
description: Generate clean lowercase slugs from titles, headings, and phrases.

faq.q: What is a slug generator?
faq.a: It converts text into a lowercase URL-friendly format with hyphens.

faq.q: When is this useful?
faq.a: It is useful for blog URLs, page slugs, and SEO-friendly links.

name: Random String Generator
intro: Generate a random text string instantly.
description: Create a simple random string for testing, placeholders, and development tasks.

faq.q: What does a random string generator do?
faq.a: It creates a random combination of letters and numbers.

faq.q: Can I use it for testing?
faq.a: Yes. It is useful for quick test values and placeholders.

name: Title Case Converter
intro: Convert text to title case.
description: Capitalize the first letter of each word quickly and easily.

faq.q: What is title case?
faq.a: Title case capitalizes the first letter of each word.

faq.q: Who uses title case converters?
faq.a: Writers, students, editors, and marketers often use them.

name: Sentence Case Converter
intro: Convert text to sentence case.
description: Make text look more natural by capitalizing the first letter of the sentence.

faq.q: What does a sentence case converter do?
faq.a: It capitalizes the first letter of the sentence and lowercases the rest where needed.

faq.q: Is it useful for copied text?
faq.a: Yes. It helps normalize messy all-caps or mixed-case text.

name: Comma to Newline Converter
intro: Convert comma-separated text into separate lines.
description: Turn comma-separated values into one item per line instantly.

faq.q: What does this tool do?
faq.a: It splits comma-separated text into separate lines.

faq.q: Is it useful for lists?
faq.a: Yes. It helps convert one-line lists into readable multi-line text.

name: Newline to Comma Converter
intro: Convert lines of text into a comma-separated list.
description: Join multiple text lines into a single comma-separated string.

faq.q: What does this tool do?
faq.a: It joins multiple lines of text into one comma-separated line.

faq.q: Can I use it for copied lists?
faq.a: Yes. It is useful for turning vertical lists into inline values.

name: Text Sorter
intro: Sort text lines alphabetically.
description: Sort lines of text in ascending alphabetical order quickly.

faq.q: What does a text sorter do?
faq.a: It sorts separate lines of text into alphabetical order.

faq.q: Can I sort lists with it?
faq.a: Yes. It is useful for names, items, keywords, and copied lists.

name: Unique Lines Tool
intro: Keep only unique lines from text.
description: Remove duplicate lines and keep each unique line once.

faq.q: What does a unique lines tool do?
faq.a: It removes repeated lines and keeps only unique entries.

faq.q: How is it different from sorting?
faq.a: Sorting changes order, while unique lines removes duplicates.

name: Empty Line Remover
intro: Remove blank lines from text.
description: Clean up text by deleting empty lines and extra blank rows.

faq.q: What does an empty line remover do?
faq.a: It removes blank or whitespace-only lines from text.

faq.q: Is it useful for pasted content?
faq.a: Yes. It helps clean copied text from documents, logs, and websites.
